title: Basilica of Our Lady of Divine Grace
tagline: Basilica of Our Lady of Divine Grace — spiritual town of Bihar

heroImage.alt: Basilica of Our Lady of Divine Grace, Bihar

overview.short: The Basilica of Our Lady of Divine Grace is a pilgrimage centre and Mariam shrine in Bihar, India.
overview.description: The Basilica of Our Lady of Divine Grace is a pilgrimage centre and Mariam shrine in Bihar, India. It was raised to the status of a minor basilica by Pope Francis in April 2024.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Mokama
topPlaces.description: Mokama is a town and a municipal council in Patna district in the Indian state of Bihar. It is located 90 km (56 mi) east of Patna on the southern banks of the river Ganges.

topPlaces.name: Mokama Ghat
topPlaces.description: Mokama Ghat is a village about four kilometres east of Mokama on the bank of the river Ganga in Bihar, India.

topPlaces.name: Ghoswari
topPlaces.description: Ghoswari is a town and a municipal council in barh of Patna district in the Indian state of Bihar. The postal index number of Ghoswari is 803212.

topPlaces.name: Nipania, Begusarai
topPlaces.description: Nipania is a residential locality at Barauni Nagar Parishad in Begusarai district, Bihar, India. It is also home to a military camp.

topPlaces.name: Aunta-Simaria Bridge
topPlaces.description: The Aunta-Simaria Bridge, also known as the Barauni–Mokama Six Lane Ganga Bridge, is a major infrastructure project in Begusarai and Patna districts in Bihar, India, that is designed to improve connectivity and reduce travel time between North and South Bihar. The bridge opened on 22 August 2025.

topPlaces.name: Simaria Ghat
topPlaces.description: Simaria Ghat (Maithili: सिमरिया घाट) is a holy place in Hinduism for the sacred bath known as Ganga Snaana in the Mithila region of Indian subcontinent. It is located at the bank of Ganga river near Barauni Thermal Power Station of the Begusarai district in Bihar state of India.

items.note: Mokama is a town and a municipal council in Patna district in the Indian state of Bihar. It is located 90 km (56 mi) east of Patna on the southern banks of the river Ganges.
Mokama Ghat is a village about four kilometres east of Mokama on the bank of the river Ganga in Bihar, India.
Ghoswari is a town and a municipal council in barh of Patna district in the Indian state of Bihar. The postal index number of Ghoswari is 803212.
Nipania is a residential locality at Barauni Nagar Parishad in Begusarai district, Bihar, India. It is also home to a military camp.

The Aunta-Simaria Bridge, also known as the Barauni–Mokama Six Lane Ganga Bridge, is a major infrastructure project in Begusarai and Patna districts in Bihar, India, that is designed to improve connectivity and reduce travel time between North and South Bihar. The bridge opened on 22 August 2025.

Simaria Ghat (Maithili: सिमरिया घाट) is a holy place in Hinduism for the sacred bath known as Ganga Snaana in the Mithila region of Indian subcontinent. It is located at the bank of Ganga river near Barauni Thermal Power Station of the Begusarai district in Bihar state of India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of Divine Grace?
faq.a: The best time to visit Basilica of Our Lady of Divine Grace is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Basilica of Our Lady of Divine Grace?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jay Prakash Narayan Airport, Patna (86 km) and the nearest railway station is Patna Junction (81 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Basilica of Our Lady of Divine Grace?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Basilica of Our Lady of Divine Grace at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Basilica of Our Lady of Divine Grace?
faq.a: Stays in Basilica of Our Lady of Divine Grace start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Basilica of Our Lady of Divine Grace?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mokama, Mokama Ghat, Ghoswari, Nipania, Begusarai, Aunta-Simaria Bridge.
